---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new ForgeKit command, agent, skill, memory behavior, or integration
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature clearly.

## Why It Belongs In ForgeKit

Explain why this should be part of the shared workflow instead of a project-local customization.

## Expected Behavior

How should the command, agent, skill, or memory behavior work?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approach did you consider?

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help design the feature.
